review_text: Peters customer service was excellent. He went out of his way to look after our family and make us feel safe. He’s an absolute legend

Lovely and quiet
Friendly owners
Good location

We'd stayed at Gum Tree a few years ago and chose it again for a stay in the days just before the Folk Festival.||We were amazed to find that our one-bedroom cabin was basically brand new, it looked like it had barely been stayed in! As a result, it was immaculate and the amenities all looked unused. The nice little deck out the front was good for morning and late afternoon sun too.||The park's location is handy for the town, just a few minutes' drive away, and it was very quiet at night.||The new cabins were incredible value for money and suited us perfectly as they're also dog-friendly so our little dog could enjoy our time here with us too.

e have stayed here before and it’s always been good but this time we had a pod. It was great for 1 night but would probably go for a studio if staying longer. Beautifully clean and dog friendly. The staff are helpful and lovely to deal with.
A great location for our family holiday. Such a relaxing atmosphere. We will definitely be back 🏕
Clean and quiet
Great caravan park with clean facilities and only a short drive to port fairy (about 5 minutes). The owners are really helpful and nice people. Will be coming back for sure!
Booking available at short notice, friendly and helpful staff, very clean amenities block and neat grounds. We booked a second night!
Amazing place to stay. Pete and Viv are so accomodating and lovely to deal with. Will definitely be back! Thanks for the great stay!
Very friendly staff... good stay. Loved it.
Very friendly staff and great place to stay  fully recommended

Cute little  caravan park out of town a little |Tea and Coffee facilities supplied |Staff very friendly |Cabin very clean would stay here again very quiet park not busy at all looks like there doing some upgrades to cabin |Laundry facilities included|Lesley and William from Western Australia
Great little caravan park. Welcoming managers and good facilities/amenities. Huge off leash area out the back.

Came here with a dog. And really enjoyed the off leash dog park behind the cabins. A hidden gem. Despite booking through a third party, Gum Tree was still very communicative and made my one night stay and late check in super easy :)

Finally a caravan park that is truly dog friendly! We received a welcome pack upon arrival for our pooch with a treat and poop bags! There is even a dedicated MASSIVE off lead area for dogs! Absolutely 😍 hospitality and service!

Whilst this van park is a little out of town, it is in a lovely location and has heaps of great facilities. Our cabin was a good size and had all the amenities needed for an overnight stay, but I could see this being a great place for longer. The staff were friendly and helpful and welcomed our two pups with treats. There was also an area for them to have a run around. Highly recommend.

Stayed two nights in our caravan and two border collie dogs. Was very quiet out of school holiday time and it was delightful. The best thing about this park was the fantastic dog play area! Fabulous hosts, and a very lovely spot.
Stayed in the pet friendly cabin for one night, the cabin was so clean, bed was comfortable, easy quick check in. Great off leash dog area to stretch their legs. Thank you
Great little park. Very clean amenities, lovely owners
If you like your camping on the quieter side there's this little gem. Owned and managed by lovely people very helpful,  amenities were spotless . Thank you
Great dog friendly accommodation, with a huge off leash area. Staff are friendly and rooms were clean.

It might be a bit outside of port fairy but that´s really the only downside. It´s definetly been one of the best campgrounds we´ve been on during our trip.
Good price for a powered site, wasn´t crammed and the facilities were nice

Wat een verademing!
Prachtige locatie voor een tussenstop, schone douches en toiletten, wasmachine, droger en Port Fairy is klein dorpje met een fantastische Italiaans restaurant.

Very comfortable beds the staff have been great lots of area for dogs to explore not much noise from the highway very quite at night time close to the rail trail cabins are very well setup and easy access and parking is right next to the cabins. Easy access
Small quiet park  lovely grassed areas  clean amenities thank you

Lovely clean cabin with all things working, very suitable for my small dog. .porch chair and table. Generous sized bathroom.  Quiet r
ural location. Friendly checkin.  Complimentary dog biscuit and poo bag was a nice touch.
Very tidy caravan park. Had a lovely stay not to far from town

Fantastic place to stay, off the main road and so quiet.
Peter and Viv are so lovely and welcoming, we stayed near the toilet block which was perfect for my elderly mother.
Camp kitchen was extremely clean as were the toilet and shower block, couldn't fault it at all. Will definitely be back.😊

Thank you for such a wonderful stay! Large sites with beautiful grass, exceptionally clean amenities and kitchen, and lovely staff/ owners. Such a lovely and quiet spot, close to town.
This park is so dog friendly, with a large fenced off-leash area featuring a doggy playground.

Stayed 2,nights in pet friendly cabin accommodation,  to have my 2,dog's with me felt like a privilege.  Excellent area for dogs to be off lead,  burning up there energy,.
Lovely clean cabin, with a perfect mattress 👌 😍  Connie

Had a fantastic stay at this CP. Nice large grass sites, which are all close to the amenities block. We stayed over the Xmas and New Years period which was very busy and thought it was very reasonably priced compared to the others in the area. The park is very well maintained and the amenities immaculate. Kids catered for with peddle carts, bikes and a playground. This is a dog friendly park with it's own off leash area.
Thanks Pete and Viv loved our stay.
Will definitely be back, highly recommend.

We stayed here in our camper van. Very reasonably priced, and a smaller park so no huge crowds, very quiet. Bathrooms were immaculate, camp kitchen also very clean and had everything we needed, The owners were really friendly. We will definitely be back. Highly recommend!
Lovely well looked after caravan park. Toilets and amenities very new and immaculate. Very friendly owner/manager. Had a very peaceful, relaxing stay.

Lovely family run caravan park. Nice smaller size meaning that it is cozy and a really close walk to the amenities from anywhere in the park. The amenities are very well maintained, very modern and extremely clean, and saw them being cleaned very often! The bathroom has plenty of toilets and showers for the size of the park, never had to wait. The kitchen has excellent facilities. The playground is also really fun for kids. Definitely recommend it.

Terrain de camping très bien tenu au calme avec un accueil chaleureux.
A 5 minutes en voiture du centre.

Sehr gut, freundlicher Betreiber hat uns auch nach 6pm einen Platz geben können.
Strom, Wasser, Küche, Toiletten, duschen... Alles da!!!
Wir haben 32 aud die Nacht bezahlt... Kann man nur empfehlen✊🏼
Peter is very friendly and attentive. Amenities are spotless - the bathrooms, showers and BBQ area. Great value for the services received

Not a very big park BUT it's a quiet place, had a cabin for a couple of nights, reception was very friendly and helpful, also giving some advice on fishing spots, cabin was spotless,nice and quiet,  camp kitchen, amenities clean,
Lovely small campground with large grassy pitches, excellent clean facilities and close to the Great Ocean Road and Port Fairy. Highly recommend this site as it is peaceful, quiet and friendly.

We are a Family of 6 and stayed here for 1 night as we were travelling the Great Ocean Rd. We pre booked which made the whole process easier. The staff were very friendly and the family cabin was nice, clean and warm! This van park has a playground for the kids which was a bonus!
Highly recommend 👌

We have recently returned home after staying in The gum Tree caravan park in Port Fairy. Even a dog biscuit was in the information bag for owners of dogs. A lovely touch.
The cabin was spotless with everything we needed supplied.
The off lead park, and adventure playground were huge.
A wonderful place for children and dogs to really run and enjoy.
Thank you both for having us.
Last minute blow in on a miserable night. Only needed an unpowered site for our campervan. The bathrooms were clean and even though we breezed out next morning, we had a peaceful night's sleep.

Recovering from back injury. Stayed with Peter and Viv at Gumtree wow. They looked out for me in the 5week of Recovery and they are fabulous people. Cannot recommend them highly enough great people great park and so dog friendly. You want a great holiday anytime of the year Gumtree caravan Park Portfairy. ❤️

We had a couple of days in a cabin at this caravan park. The cabin was spotless, the kitchenette well equipped and the owner happy to assist with our extra needs. V well run.
Thanks Viv and Peter
We'll be back when we're in Port Fairy again.
The basic cabin was clean, comfortable, quiet and well priced. My dog was welcome too.

Thank you Viv and Pete for welcoming us to your beautiful Park! - we loved your cabin, very comfortable night's sleep on a fantastic mattress and clean. Our two dogs had a wonderful time in the off-leash area, they really didn't want to leave! your amenities are the best we have ever experienced, we will be back when returning to gorgeous Port Fairy :-)

The owners were very accommodating. Fantastic facilities for doggos including an exclusive playground!  The kiddies get one too. Lovely rural setting with cattle and sheep in adjacent paddocks. Close to the township and stunning beaches.

We had a comfortable 2-bed cabin. Pretty standard caravan park cabin (we've stayed in identical cabins elsewhere).
Roomy enough, with pretty much all the facilities you could need.
Only real complaint is that the mattress was pretty hard. Kept waking up with sore hip or shoulder from the firmness of the mattress. May not matter to a back sleeper.
Location is not far out of Pt Fairy on Warrnambool side, and a few hundred metres back from the highway so it was pretty peaceful. Didn't notice much traffic noise.
It's not within walking distance of town though, so you have to drive everywhere.
Pt Fairy is 5 minutes by car to the main street.
Warrnambool is only 20 or so minutes away, so it's not a bad place to stay if you are going to the races or some other event.
It's only a small park, so won't get too busy or noisy, I don't expect, with maybe a dozen cabins, and sites for around same number of vans or tents.
I'd be happy to stay here again.
Great little Pet Friendly Caravan Park. Neat and tidy would highly recommend 👌

Great little park, excellent amenities and camp kitchen. Friendly helpful owners. Obviously dog friendly as lots of well behaved pooches seemed to enjoying their stay also. Quiet and peaceful. Would definitely stay again.

Repeat customer.

Peter and Viv run a great operation and are super friendly. Highly recommend.
Will be back again

Lovely country  location great layout close to town with new clean facilities camp kitchen beautiful lawns and friendly and efficient staff :)) and they like dogs 🐕‍🦺 we are on the road for many months and this is one of the best we have been to we will be back 😊

Great little camp site with cabins, powered and un powered pitches.
Cheap with good aminaties.
Guy that runs the place is a blast.

Excellent caravan park, intimate size - not one the crazy big ones. Very accommodating of people travelling with dogs and or kids - both having sperate parks to play in. Lots of lovely touches. Stayed in a pleasant cabin, bit out of town but only minutes in the car to see the sights of the lovely Port Fairy .
Small park but lovely. Staff friendly, sites grassy, little playground. Nice amenities. Beautiful large dog area. Wish we could have stayed a few days.

Beautiful quiet little caravan park. We thoroughly enjoyed staying here grass sites were really well kept and grassy! They had all the activities for the kids from the playground, activities packs, go karts, basketball ring, giant chess/checkers, Table tennis and a little sheep the kids loved to visit. Amenities were so clean and showers had great pressure and roomy. They even had a little community herb garden. All the staff were so lovely and helpful. My only suggestion would be a couple of extra Powerpoints in the lady’s bathroom. Overall we had an amazing stay! Thankyou!

Perfect set up for well behaved dogs and well behaved owners.
Cannot fault the place.
We'll be back.

We recently stayed at the park and were very impressed with how clean the cabin and park facilites were. This was a huge stand out.
The staff were also very friendly.
We will definitely staying at the park the next time were visiting Port Fairy.

Viv and Pete (the owners) were wonderful throughout our six day stay at their park.  We experienced two types of cabins,  both clean and comfortable. We have already booked in for our next stay in February and looking forward to another great experience.

Great caravan park, awesome place to take dogs with you on holidays, great facilities including being able to chill by the campfire, very relaxed park would definetly recommend to anyone heading to port fairy
